title: Aterian (ATER) Earnings Preview - March 2023
text: Earnings Report Date: Thursday, March 9, 2023. Analyst EPS estimate: -$0.27. Stock price as of March 7: $1.12. 52-week performance: Down 57.03%. Investors should focus on whether the company beats expectations and provides positive forward guidance. It is sometimes not an earnings beat or miss that most affects the price of a stock, but the guidance or forecast. Recent History shows that in Q3 2022 the company beat estimate by $0.01 yet the stock fell 4.72% the following day. Q2 2022 beat estimate by $0.02 yet fell 14.09%. Q1 2022 met estimate yet fell 10.78%. Long-term shareholders appear bearish heading into this release, given the stock's significant year-over-year decline.
